calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Continued To May-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Woods in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that Ms. Woods will need to consult with an attorney and that the 2nd amended petition is still insufficient. Ms. Woods asked for a court appointed attorney. The Court explained that there is no court appointed attorney, that she could call the bar association and request a pro bono attorney and provided Ms. Woods with a list of paralegals but explained that there would be a cost involved. The petition for spousal property was continued to May 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Continued To Apr-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Susan Woods in Propria Personal.

The Court asked Ms. Woods if there was a possibility that she would obtain counsel stating that the petition needs to be amended, that there are many items missing, that the Probate Examiner Mr. Kneiss will provide a copy of the notes, requested that Ms. Woods provide her current address to the clerk and that it will continue the matter to give her time to talk to counsel and get the amended petition on file. The petition for spousal property was continued to April 18, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
